invariants.name: No Managed Repo Imports
invariants.evidence: 0 matches for 'from videofoundry', 'import videofoundry', 'from tools.audit', 'from managed_repo' in src/operations_center/; AST boundary checks in 15 test modules

invariants.name: Contract Ownership
invariants.evidence: All schemas and Pydantic models in src/operations_center/; schemas/ contains run_status, artifact_manifest, fixture_pack, governance_report; no VideoFoundry-side contract files

invariants.name: Discovery Chain
invariants.evidence: audit_toolset/discovery.py: load_run_status_entrypoint() → resolve_artifact_manifest_path() → load_artifact_manifest(); ArtifactManifestPathMissingError on missing field; no directory scanning; 47 toolset + 10 integration tests

invariants.name: Manifest as Source of Truth
invariants.evidence: load_artifact_manifest() in artifact_index/loader.py is the only entry point to artifact data; no directory scanning or path inference in any module

invariants.name: Run Identity Authority
invariants.evidence: run_identity/generator.py: generate_managed_run_identity() uses secrets.token_hex(4) + UTC timestamp; AUDIT_RUN_ID injected before subprocess; 52 tests

invariants.name: One Audit Per Repo
invariants.evidence: audit_dispatch/locks.py: ManagedRepoAuditLockRegistry; acquire_audit_lock(repo_id) raises RepoLockAlreadyHeldError if held; process-scoped (noted in dispatch_managed_audit() docstring)

invariants.name: No Auto-Collapse
invariants.evidence: behavior_calibration/guardrails.py: _FORBIDDEN_MUTATION_FIELDS raises GuardrailViolation; no auto_apply/execute/deploy in recommendation models; 35 anti-collapse tests

invariants.name: Recommendations Are Advisory
invariants.evidence: No auto_apply/execute methods in behavior_calibration/; CalibrationDecision.approved_by required; related_recommendation_ids is list[str] context only

invariants.name: Fixture Packs Preserve Provenance
invariants.evidence: FixturePack: source_repo_id, source_run_id, source_audit_type, source_manifest_path, source_index_summary; FixtureArtifact: source_artifact_id, checksum, copied; load_fixture_pack() validates copied=True files exist on disk; 78 tests

invariants.name: Replay Is Local and Deterministic
invariants.evidence: slice_replay/runner.py: no subprocess calls, no dispatch import, reads fixture pack only; all 6 SliceReplayProfile values covered by CHECK_REGISTRY; 46 tests; selector.py documents deterministic ordering

invariants.name: Mini Regression Does Not Escalate
invariants.evidence: mini_regression/runner.py: no dispatch_managed_audit import; 58 tests; test_chain_no_dispatch_imported and test_full_system_no_videoFoundry_imports confirm boundary

invariants.name: Full Audit Governance Gates Heavy Runs
invariants.evidence: run_governed_audit() enforces all 8 policy checks before dispatch. The operations-center-audit run bypass is a documented, intentional Phase 6 escape hatch — module docstring and arch doc both carry an explicit WARNING block. 109 governance tests; 18 governance CLI tests; 4 full-system integration tests verify the governance path.

invariants.name: Mini Regression First
invariants.evidence: audit_governance/policy.py: _check_mini_regression_first(); urgency=low/normal without suite report → needs_manual_approval; all branches tested. Note: evidence check is path-presence attestation (bool(path)), not file-existence validation — see gap_r6_001.

checks.name: CLI entrypoint test coverage
checks.notes: All 7 entrypoints have CliRunner tests: governance(18), regression(15), audit(10), artifacts(10), calibration(11), fixtures(9), replay(9) = 82 CLI tests total

checks.name: Config file consistency

checks.name: mini_regression_first evidence validation
checks.notes: _check_mini_regression_first() validates bool(related_suite_report_path) only; does not verify file exists, is readable, or belongs to correct repo/audit_type; confirmed by runtime test

checks.name: JSON schema coverage for persisted reports
checks.notes: BehaviorCalibrationReport (Phase 8), SliceReplayReport (Phase 10), MiniRegressionSuiteReport (Phase 11) are persisted to disk but have no JSON schema files; only Phase 9 and Phase 12 have external schemas

gaps.description: _check_mini_regression_first() validates only bool(request.related_suite_report_path) — any non-empty string is accepted as evidence. The file is not checked for existence, readability, or repo/audit_type match. An operator can pass any non-empty string to satisfy the policy check. This is likely by design: the model docstring calls related_suite_report_path 'Evidence context — informational, never approval'. The path is recorded in the governance audit trail.
gaps.evidence: audit_governance/policy.py:178 — has_evidence = bool(request.related_suite_report_path). Confirmed: related_suite_report_path='/nonexistent/path/suite_report.json' returns status='passed' with reason='Related mini regression suite report is present.'
gaps.recommended_action: Add an inline comment to _check_mini_regression_first() stating: 'Path existence is not validated — this is an operator attestation, not a file reference check. The path is recorded for audit trail purposes.' No behavioral change needed.

gaps.description: Three phases write structured reports to disk (write_calibration_report, write_replay_report, write_suite_report) but have no JSON schema files. Phase 9 (fixture_pack.schema.json) and Phase 12 (governance_report.schema.json) have schemas because they are external contracts or compliance artifacts. Phases 8, 10, and 11 are internal pipeline artifacts whose Pydantic models serve as their only schema.
gaps.evidence: schemas/ directory contains only audit_contracts/, fixture_harvesting/, and governance/. No schemas/behavior_calibration/, schemas/slice_replay/, or schemas/mini_regression/ directories.
gaps.recommended_action: Generate JSON schemas from BehaviorCalibrationReport.model_json_schema(), SliceReplayReport.model_json_schema(), and MiniRegressionSuiteReport.model_json_schema() into schemas/behavior_calibration/, schemas/slice_replay/, and schemas/mini_regression/. No code changes required — documentation artifacts only.

suggested_followup_tasks.title: Generate JSON schemas for Phase 8/10/11 reports (gap_r6_002)
suggested_followup_tasks.description: Emit BehaviorCalibrationReport, SliceReplayReport, and MiniRegressionSuiteReport JSON schemas from model_json_schema() into schemas/ subdirectories.

suggested_followup_tasks.title: CI integration guide

suggested_followup_tasks.title: Consider top-level repo_id/audit_type in MiniRegressionSuiteReport
suggested_followup_tasks.description: Currently traceability from suite report back to repo runs through individual fixture pack entries. A top-level repo_id/audit_type field would make filtering and indexing easier for governance consumers.

lockdown_rules: No new code may bypass Phase 1-12 contracts.
No new discovery paths may bypass run_status.json.
No new artifact consumers may bypass manifest/index.
No calibration output may mutate runtime.
No replay/regression layer may call dispatch.
No new governance approvals may bind on decision_id alone — must use request_id.
No file-backed state may be read/written without holding the fcntl exclusive lock.
No audit type may be approved if known_audit_types is empty (deny by default).
No governance_report.json may omit governance_status (schema v1.1 enforces this).
known_non_goals: No full audit scheduling (daemon, watch loop, cron)
No managed repo Python code imports
No Windows support for file locking (Linux/macOS only)
No file-existence validation of governance evidence paths (attestation model by design)

entrypoints.operations-center-audit: operations_center.entrypoints.audit.main:app — documented escape hatch; bypasses governance; use operations-center-governance for production
entrypoints.operations-center-governance: operations_center.entrypoints.governance.main:app — production dispatch path enforcing all 8 governance policies

remaining_risks: gap_r6_001 (low, implicit_behavior): mini_regression_first_policy accepts path attestation without file validation — operator-intent-to-bypass risk only; audit trail records the claimed path
gap_r6_002 (low, documentation_gap): BehaviorCalibrationReport, SliceReplayReport, MiniRegressionSuiteReport lack external JSON schemas — no runtime risk; internal Pydantic models are authoritative
First live VideoFoundry audit run not yet executed (low) — fake-producer integration tests validate the contract
fcntl file locking is Linux/macOS only (low) — documented
final_declaration.declaration: The managed repo audit system across Phases 0-12 is declared locked as of 2026-04-26 (Rev 6). All 13 invariants verified with no violations and no partial statuses. 2733 tests pass (2715 unit + 18 integration), 0 failures, 4 skipped (live service only), 1 expected warning. No forbidden imports. Correct unidirectional import graph enforced by AST checks in 15 test modules. 21 of 23 lifetime gaps closed. 2 open gaps (both low): one implicit behavior in evidence attestation (no file-exists check in mini_regression_first_policy) and one documentation coverage gap (no external schemas for 3 pipeline report types). Neither gap affects correctness, contract enforcement, runtime behavior, or invariant status. The system is architecturally complete and locked.
